title: ALLO Stock Spikes As ALPHA3 CAR-T Data Resets Expectations
text: ALLO Stock Surges on ALPHA3 CAR-T Trial Success. Catalyst: Allogene (ALLO) stock jumped 8.06% after positive interim data from Phase 2/3 ALPHA3 study of allogeneic CAR-T. Trial Results: 58.3% MRD clearance vs observation alone. 41.6% absolute MRD advantage vs control. Wall Street Response: Jefferies raised target from $6 to $10 (clearly exceeded expectations). H.C. Wainwright lifted to $12. Citizens moved from $5 to $8. Baird increased to $9. Financial Profile: Pre-revenue biotech with $38.8M quarterly losses. Strong liquidity: $415.9M assets, 7.9 current ratio. Next Catalyst: Interim event-free survival around mid-2027.
